Name: Parallel Light
Description: Directional lighting system that simulates distant light sources such as sunlight, where all light rays are parallel. Supports multi-slot lighting parameters, hemisphere shading, point-cloud based effects, and global illumination scaling for advanced scene illumination control.

Fields.Name: Is Parallel Light Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the parallel (directional) light contribution in the scene lighting calculation.

Fields.Name: Angle: 0
Fields.Description: Primary directional angle of the first light channel, defining the orientation of the parallel light source.

Fields.Name: Diffuse Color: 0
Fields.Description: Diffuse lighting color for channel 0, controlling base light contribution on matte surfaces.

Fields.Name: Specular Color: 0
Fields.Description: Specular reflection color for channel 0, defining highlight tint from directional light reflections.

Fields.Name: Hemisphere Color Up: 0
Fields.Description: Sky-facing hemisphere lighting color for channel 0, simulating ambient sky illumination from above.

Fields.Name: Hemisphere Color Down: 0
Fields.Description: Ground-facing hemisphere lighting color for channel 0, simulating bounce light from the ground or lower environment.

Fields.Name: Additive Hemisphere Color Up: 0
Fields.Description: Additional additive sky hemisphere contribution for fine-tuning ambient upper lighting intensity.

Fields.Name: Additive Hemisphere Color Down: 0
Fields.Description: Additional additive ground hemisphere contribution for enhancing ambient lower lighting.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Scale: 0
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for point-based lighting distribution used to approximate indirect or volumetric light scattering.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Offset: 0
Fields.Description: Positional offset for point cloud light sampling, adjusting spatial distribution of indirect lighting.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Scale 0: Slot 1
Fields.Description: Secondary point cloud scale modifier for additional lighting layer or sampling slot 1.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Offset 0: Slot 1
Fields.Description: Offset for point cloud slot 1, used to shift secondary indirect lighting distribution.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Scale 0: Slot 2
Fields.Description: Scaling for third-layer point cloud lighting, enabling multi-layer indirect illumination control.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Offset 0: Slot 2
Fields.Description: Offset for point cloud slot 2, adjusting spatial variation of layered light sampling.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Scale 0: Slot 3
Fields.Description: Scaling for additional point cloud lighting layer 3, used for fine indirect lighting refinement.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Offset 0: Slot 3
Fields.Description: Offset for point cloud slot 3, controlling distribution of tertiary indirect lighting samples.

Fields.Name: Global Illumination Color Scale: 0
Fields.Description: Multiplier for global illumination color contribution from directional light channel 0.

Fields.ID: ライトをカメラに追従 0
Fields.Name: Light Tracks Camera: 0
Fields.Description: Makes the directional light orientation follow the camera direction for consistent lighting in camera-relative systems.

Fields.ID: ライトマップを無効にする 0
Fields.Name: Disable Light Map: 0
Fields.Description: Disables baked lightmap contribution for this light channel, forcing real-time lighting only.

Fields.Name: Angle: 10
Fields.Description: Directional angle for secondary light configuration set 10, defining light orientation for that layer.

Fields.Name: Diffuse Color: 10
Fields.Description: Diffuse lighting color for channel 10, controlling base surface illumination for that light layer.

Fields.Name: Specular Color: 10
Fields.Description: Specular highlight color for light channel 10, affecting reflective surface brightness and tint.

Fields.Name: Hemisphere Color Up: 10
Fields.Description: Sky hemisphere ambient color for channel 10, simulating upper environmental lighting.

Fields.Name: Hemisphere Color Down: 10
Fields.Description: Ground hemisphere ambient color for channel 10, simulating reflected environmental light from below.

Fields.Name: Additive Hemisphere Color Up: 10
Fields.Description: Additional sky hemisphere contribution for channel 10, used to boost ambient upper lighting.

Fields.Name: Additive Hemisphere Color Down: 10
Fields.Description: Additional ground hemisphere contribution for channel 10, enhancing lower ambient light.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Scale: 10
Fields.Description: Scaling factor for point cloud lighting in channel 10, controlling spatial distribution of indirect lighting samples.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Offset: 10
Fields.Description: Offset applied to point cloud lighting in channel 10, shifting indirect light sampling positions.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Scale 10: Slot 1
Fields.Description: First slot scaling for point cloud lighting in channel 10, enabling layered indirect light adjustment.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Offset 10: Slot 1
Fields.Description: Offset for slot 1 of point cloud lighting in channel 10.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Scale 10: Slot 2
Fields.Description: Second slot scaling for point cloud lighting in channel 10.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Offset 10: Slot 2
Fields.Description: Offset for slot 2 of point cloud lighting in channel 10.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Scale 10: Slot 3
Fields.Description: Third slot scaling for point cloud lighting in channel 10.

Fields.Name: Point Cloud Offset 10: Slot 3
Fields.Description: Offset for slot 3 of point cloud lighting in channel 10.

Fields.Name: Global Illumination Color Scale: 10
Fields.Description: Global illumination color multiplier for light channel 10, scaling indirect lighting contribution.

Fields.ID: ライトをカメラに追従 10
Fields.Name: Light Tracks Camera: 10
Fields.Description: Makes light channel 10 follow camera orientation for consistent camera-relative directional lighting.

Fields.ID: ライト向きを、ライト0に追従 10
Fields.Name: Direction of Light Follows Light 0: 10
Fields.Description: Synchronizes light direction of channel 10 with channel 0, ensuring consistent directional lighting alignment.

Fields.ID: ライトマップを無効にする 10
Fields.Name: Disable Lightmap: 10
Fields.Description: Disables baked lightmap contribution for channel 10, forcing dynamic lighting only.

Fields.ID: αをフェードで薄くする
Fields.Name: Fade Out Alpha
Fields.Description: Enables alpha fading over time to smoothly transition light visibility in and out of the scene.

Fields.ID: αをフェードで薄くするまで待つ時間
Fields.Name: Delay for Alpha Fade Out
Fields.Description: Delay time before alpha fade-out begins, allowing timed light disappearance transitions.

Fields.ID: αをフェードで薄くする時間
Fields.Name: Duration for Alpha Fade Out
Fields.Description: Duration over which the light alpha fades to zero, controlling smoothness of light deactivation.
